action_required: DECIDER: Before integrating EXP-451 P3a, reconsider the new caption wording. EXP-451 P3a proposes changing the falsifiability-module caption from 'Four conditions assessed against the dome's N claimed wins — any one is sufficient to upgrade a verdict' to 'Four pre-committed conditions — set before the data, satisfiable by any future dome derivation. We will upgrade the relevant verdict if any one is met.' The current wording ('any one is sufficient') states sufficiency as a fact. The proposed 'We will upgrade ... if any one is met' is conditional commitment language that a dome defender can read as opt-out room. Recommend keeping 'any one is sufficient to upgrade a verdict' in the caption even if the 'pre-committed conditions' framing is added elsewhere.
notes: Caption softness issue. EXP-451 not yet integrated. Current generate-html.js line 1581 already has the stronger wording. Decider should preserve it when applying P3a.
